honesty.drafting: 2010-2019 cohorts only (complete 7-season runway); busts count as 0; goalies not value-graded; per_pick_excl_best removes each regime's best pick -- one McDavid is not a process.
honesty.signing: Non-ELC skater deals, observed seasons only; surplus = WAR delivered priced at $5.25M/WAR minus cap paid. Small samples are loud.
honesty.trading: PLAYER legs only, 3-season WAR after the deal; pick legs are flagged (deals_with_pick_legs), retained salary flagged unpriced. Player-for-picks deals read one-sided -- judge accordingly.
honesty.profiles: Descriptive preferences vs same-era baseline, not value judgments.
